welcome.tagline: A non-custodial Bitcoin & Lightning wallet. Your keys, your coins.

unlock.title: Unlock wallet
unlock.subtitle: Enter your wallet password to continue.
unlock.forgotPassword: Forgot password? Restore from recovery phrase
unlock.forget: Forget this wallet on this device

passkey.createFailed: Couldn't create a passkey. Try again or use the password flow.
passkey.signInFailed: Couldn't sign in with passkey. Try again.
passkey.unlockSubtitle: Use your fingerprint, face, or device PIN to unlock.
passkey.backupDescription: Optional but recommended. These words let you restore your wallet if you ever lose access to your passkey on every device.
passkey.backupHint: Anyone with these words can spend your funds. Keep the paper somewhere safe and don't take a screenshot.

welcome.footer: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

forgetWallet.title: Forget this wallet?
forgetWallet.description: This erases the encrypted wallet from this browser. Funds remain controlled by your recovery phrase. Without it, anything in this wallet is gone for good.

subheading.phrase: Write down these 12 words in order and keep them safe. You'll need them to recover your wallet.
subheading.verify: Tap the words in the order they appear in your phrase. This proves you have a working backup.
subheading.password: This password encrypts your wallet on this device. You will need it every time you unlock.
subheading.driveOffer: Optional: save an encrypted copy of your 12-word recovery phrase to your own Google Drive so you can restore on other devices without typing the 12 words.

security.title: Important security information
security.neverShare: Never share your recovery phrase with anyone.
security.storeOffline: Store it offline in a secure location.
security.anyoneCanAccess: Anyone with these words can access your funds.

reveal.subtitle: Make sure no one is looking at your screen.
reveal.acceptTerms: I understand and accept these terms

selfCustody.title: Self-custody.
selfCustody.body: You hold your keys directly. No bank, exchange, or company can freeze, seize, or lose your Bitcoin for you.

censorshipResistant.title: Censorship resistant.
censorshipResistant.body: Your transactions go straight to the Bitcoin network. No one can block, reverse, or approve them.

create.tip: Tip: Write these words on paper in the exact order shown and keep the paper somewhere safe. Don't take a screenshot, don't save them in a notes app, and don't send them anywhere.

orderMatters.title: Order and exact wording matter.
orderMatters.body: These 12 words only recover your wallet in the exact sequence shown, written in English. Translating them or changing the order means you won't be able to recover your wallet.

verify.incorrect: Incorrect order. Tap the words again in the order they appear in your phrase.

password.label: Wallet password
password.noRecovery: There is no password recovery. If you forget this password, restore the wallet from your recovery phrase.
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

drive.blurbCiphertext: What gets saved: your 12-word recovery phrase, encrypted with your wallet password. Google sees an unreadable file. Without your password, the file can't be used.
drive.blurbConvenience: Your written-down phrase is still the master backup. Drive just lets you restore on another device without typing the 12 words.
drive.failed: Failed to start Google Drive backup

subtitle.method: Choose how you want to restore your wallet
subtitle.password: Set a wallet password to encrypt this device

phrase.title: From recovery phrase
phrase.subtitle: Type your 12 words to restore the wallet on this device.

drive.title: From Google Drive
drive.subtitle: Sign in to your Google account to download your encrypted vault.
drive.startFailed: Failed to start Google Drive sign-in

phrase.title: Recovery Phrase
phrase.invalid: Invalid recovery phrase. Please check the words and try again.
phrase.overwriteWarning: Restoring will replace the existing wallet on this device. Make sure you still have its recovery phrase before continuing.

overwrite.title: Replace the wallet on this device?
overwrite.description: Restoring erases the existing encrypted wallet from this browser. Funds in the existing wallet remain controlled by its recovery phrase. Make sure you still have it before continuing.

driveCallback.noBackup: No backup found in your Google Drive. Did you back up from this app before?

refund.subtitle: Couldn't add some incoming Bitcoin to your wallet automatically. Send them back to a Bitcoin address you control.

seed.description: Re-enter your wallet password to reveal the 12 words.
seed.warning: Anyone with these words can drain your wallet. Never share them and avoid cloud-synced plaintext storage.

send.title: Send Payment

destination.title: Destination
destination.label: Invoice, Lightning address, Bitcoin address, or Spark address
destination.helper: The wallet will figure out the payment type

amount.label: Amount (sats)
amount.helper: Optional for invoices that already encode an amount

send.lnurlAmountRequired: Enter an amount to send to this Lightning address
send.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. You can send up to {{balance}} sats
send.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

unsupported.lnurlAuth: LNURL-auth is for logging in, not paying. Use it elsewhere.
unsupported.lnurlWithdraw: LNURL-withdraw is for receiving, not sending.
unsupported.url: That looks like a web link, not a payment destination.
unsupported.silentPayment: Silent payment addresses aren't supported yet.

methods.bitcoinSubtitle: Added to your wallet on confirmation

lightning.addressSubtitle: Share this with anyone who wants to pay you over Lightning.

invoice.openLink: Or create a one-time invoice for a specific amount
invoice.title: One-time invoice
invoice.expired: Invoice expired. Generate a new one.

bitcoin.title: One-time Bitcoin address
bitcoin.subtitle: Pay from any Bitcoin wallet. Funds are added to your wallet automatically once confirmed.

recovery.title: Get refund
recovery.nothing: Nothing needs a refund. All incoming Bitcoin is being added to your wallet automatically.
recovery.explainer: These Bitcoin transfers couldn't be added to your wallet automatically. Usually that's because network fees were higher than the wallet's configured cap. You can refund them to a Bitcoin address you control.

lightningAddress.title: Lightning address
lightningAddress.subtitle: A human-readable address (like an email) that anyone can pay over Lightning.

driveBackup.title: Google Drive backup
driveBackup.subtitle: Stores an encrypted copy of your wallet in your own Google Drive (hidden app folder). Your recovery phrase is still the master backup.
driveBackup.connectStartFailed: Failed to start Google Drive sign-in
driveBackup.disconnectConfirmDescription: This removes the encrypted file from your Google Drive. To restore on another device you'll need your recovery phrase, not Google Drive.
driveBackup.disconnectWarning: The wallet on this device is not affected. Only the Drive copy is deleted.

currency.title: Display currency
currency.subtitle: Used for fiat equivalents shown alongside sats.

claimLeeway.title: Auto-claim deposits
claimLeeway.subtitle: On-chain deposits are claimed automatically when the network fee rate is at most recommended + leeway sat/vB. Higher leeway means more claims succeed but you may overpay during quiet periods.
claimLeeway.label: Leeway (sat/vB)
claimLeeway.helper: Default {{default}}. Takes effect after the next wallet restart.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Erase the encrypted wallet from this browser. Funds remain controlled by your recovery phrase.

claimUsername.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, dots, underscores, hyphens (max 32).

transactions.emptyHint: Your Lightning payments will appear here.

editUsername.title: Edit Lightning address
editUsername.description: Changing your username releases {{address}}. Anyone who has it saved will see payments fail and need the new one.
editUsername.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, dots, underscores, hyphens (max 32).

buyBitcoin.cashAppSubtitle: US/UK only · pays a Lightning invoice
buyBitcoin.amountTooLow: Amount must be at least {{min}} sats
buyBitcoin.cashAppInfo: Cash App will show the equivalent in your local currency and charge your Cash or BTC balance.
buyBitcoin.cashAppFailed: Failed to create Cash App invoice
buyBitcoin.qrInstructions: Scan this code with Cash App, or open the link on a device with Cash App installed.
buyBitcoin.autoRefresh: This dialog will refresh automatically once the payment lands.
